name: Recognition and treatment of serotonin syndrome - PMC
snippet: Drugs with long half-lives can interact several weeks after discontinuation; fluoxetine interactions have been reported up to 5 weeks after discontinuation.

name: 06. How to Initiate MAOI Therapy: Steps to Follow
